title: Now Hiring Production Engineer at Berger Paints Global Group

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Production Engineer at Berger Paints Global Group
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Production Engineer with drive and ambition, Berger Paints Global Group in Ludhiana is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Berger Paints Global Group:
Berger Paints Global Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in FMEA

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Flexible working hours
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Berger Paints Global Group!
